treasuryEndpoints.notes: No imports/fetches in apps/web/src/lib/liquidity-building-runtime. Historical probe docs only (LB001/LB006).
Not wired. Authorizer is on-chain EIP-712 vs KMS signingAuthority.
Not wired. Intent field treasuryAuthorizationReference is bytes32 metadata, not an HTTP ticket.
Generic batch receipt exists on Treasury Runtime; LB settlement schema NOT_IMPLEMENTED. BlockedTreasuryIngestor never HTTP-calls Runtime.
Live: CONNECTED but environment=development chain=none — used as activation evidence, not per-epoch.

gates.currentPurpose: Non-exportable KMS/HSM signing authority for ExecutionIntent digests
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain. Executor identity only — not Treasury permission.

gates.currentPurpose: Production KMS signature normalization verified against Authorizer
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain as one-time production verification + ongoing signer readiness.

gates.currentPurpose: Permissionless relay submits opaque signed calldata
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain. Must not alter economics; no Treasury ticket required.

gates.currentPurpose: Canonical non-EOA Treasury fee receiver address for FeeSink constructor
gates.actualCaller: LiquidityBuildingTreasuryFeeSinkV1 constructor; Factory binding checks; activation-gates.ts
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain as deploy-time binding. Do not require live Runtime HTTP.
Convert to asynchronous observability. Must not block activationAuthorized or on-chain execute. Index events after FeePaid.
gates.evidence: activation-gate-final FAIL; loop.ts TREASURY_UNAVAILABLE after submit; no HTTP client to Runtime

gates.currentPurpose: Reconciliation distinguishing executionId / settlementReceipt / Runtime ack
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain as async accounting requirement. Do not gate activation or atomic on-chain success.
gates.evidence: Blocked with LB-G04C in activation matrix; isEconomicallySuccessful requires treasurySettled

gates.currentPurpose: Founder-ratified quote floors published into deploy inputs / on-chain quotePolicy

gates.proposedBehavior: Retain as versioned/on-chain policy. Not live Treasury quote API per epoch.
gates.evidence: quotePolicies=[]; Factory successFeeBps==500; quotePolicy checks in Program.execute

gates.currentPurpose: USDT/USDC gas conversion path or explicit NOT_ACTIVE
gates.proposedBehavior: Keep USDT/USDC NOT_ACTIVE for WBNB-only activation.

gates.currentPurpose: Finality depth 15 evidence for observation/ingestion safety
gates.actualCaller: eligible-flow assessFinality; readiness finalityEvidenceOk; activation gates
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain for observation finality. Align indexer; do not couple to Treasury SPA environment.
Retain but remove LB-G04C OPERATIONAL as mandatory validator precondition.

gates.currentPurpose: bytes32 carried in Intent → Sink settlement record / receipt hash
gates.proposedBehavior: Retain as on-chain provenance/idempotency reference generated by executor (e.g. hash of executionId+epoch). Rename mentally from 'Treasury ticket'. Do not fetch via Runtime API.
gates.evidence: FeeSink only checks != 0; tests use keccak256('auth-ref'); no Runtime signature check

gates.currentPurpose: loop.ts refuses to claim success when BlockedTreasuryIngestor.ready=false
gates.proposedBehavior: On-chain success is ExecutionCompleted+FeeSettled+LP. Runtime ingest becomes async job; loop may COMPLETE with RECONCILE_PENDING.
